en.title: Semantic clustering
en.prompt: Cluster the following keywords into groups based on their semantic relevance: [keywords]

related.title: language literary critic
related.remark: Analyzing and interpreting literary works, while providing their origins and influence.

related.title: lunatic
related.remark: Play the role of a crazy person and reply with meaningless and illogical sentences.

related.title: plagiarism checker
related.remark: Determine whether the input sentence exists in the ChatGPT database.

metaDescription: Messy keywords? Cluster list into semantically relevant groups. Improve content structure and relevance with organized semantic grouping instantly.

faq.q: The cluster granularity is too coarse or too fine, how do I adjust?
faq.a: Add to the request "keep the number of clusters between 5 and 8, each with at least 3 keywords." Without bounds the AI either gives you 2 overly broad groups or one keyword per cluster, losing the point of clustering. Specifying a range is the key to getting usable groupings.

faq.q: Can it output directly in Excel format?
faq.a: Have it output as a Markdown table (columns: group / theme word / keyword list / search intent). Copy into Excel using "Paste from clipboard - HTML" and the table structure is preserved, much less effort than reorganizing line by line.
